text.title: Release QA Cycle Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-release-qa-cycle-template.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.code: { "cycle_id": "rel-2026-05-23-v2.4", "release_id": "v2.4.0", "stages": [ { "id": "strategy", "owner": "alice", "outcome": "pass", "waiver_reason": null, "artefact_link": "release/v2.4/strategy.md" }, { "id": "smoke", "owner": "bob", "outcome": "pass", "waiver_reason": null, "artefact_link": "release/v2.4/smoke.yaml" }, { "id": "bug_bash", "owner": "carol", "outcome": "pass", "waiver_reason": null, "artefact_link": "release/v2.4/bug-bash-ledger.csv" }, { "id": "perf", "owner": "dave", "outcome": "pass", "waiver_reason": null, "artefact_link": "release/v2.4/perf-verdict.json" }, { "id": "rollback_triggers", "owner": "eve", "outcome": "pass", "waiver_reason": null, "artefact_link": "release/v2.4/rollback-canon.yaml" }, { "id": "go_no_go", "owner": "frank", "outcome": "pass", "waiver_reason": null, "artefact_link": "release/v2.4/go-no-go.md" } ], "decision": "go", "approver": "frank", "retro_note": "keep: smoke pack speed; change: bug-bash needs earlier kickoff.", "recorded_at": "2026-05-23T16:00:00Z" }
example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: stages count != 6; outcome not in enum; waiver_reason missing when outcome=waived; decision not in [go,no_go]; retro_note missing.
